{{# Mister Chameleon — personalisation snippet loader ------------------------------------------------- Place this partial inside your site's (once, site-wide). It loads the Mister Chameleon snippet, which reads the site key from `data-site-key`, calls /api/snippet/decide, and swaps every element marked `data-mc-slot="..."` (see mc_context_slot.antlers.html) with the visitor's personalised content. Set your site key: • Preferred: define a `mc_site_key` variable (Statamic global "settings", or a .env value surfaced to Antlers) so it is not hard-coded per template. • Or replace the fallback string below with your key from the Mister Chameleon dashboard (Setup → Snippet). The snippet is anti-flicker: it briefly hides the page until the decision returns (or a short timeout elapses), then reveals the personalised content. #}}
